name: inspect
description: Query a specific aspect of engine state. Use this for targeted lookups instead of a full diagnose snapshot. Supported targets: 'config', 'identity', 'tool', 'state', 'metrics', 'history', 'docs'.

key.description: Optional key to narrow the query. For 'identity': tier name (e.g., 'eng'). For 'tool': tool name (e.g., 'filesystem.read_file'). For 'config': config section (e.g., 'model', 'loop', 'permissions'). For 'docs': section name. For 'history': number of recent entries as string.
